docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-24-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF ROBERT JENSEN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ERIK SANDSIS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. COMMISSIONER PANG LY; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF JENSEN, ROBERT
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF JENSEN, ROBERT AS TO DEFENDANT SANDS, ERIK
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,300.00 FILED BY JENSEN, ROBERT AS TO DEFENDANT SANDS, ERIK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-20-2020 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-18-2020 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO SEP-24-2020 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT SANDS, ERIK

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JENSEN, ROBERT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANDS, ERIK $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $565.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-20-2020 - CONTINUED TO JUN-18-2020 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
